description: Dazzly is a website builder for small and medium businesses. It lets users create, host, update, and publish websites, and its MCP connector allows supported AI assistants to work with a user's Dazzly website content.
summary: Dazzly exposes a public remote MCP server at `https://prod.mcp.dazzly.co/mcp`, authenticated with Dazzly OAuth; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found.
